Submit/avatar API endpoints remain separate Rust-backend migration work.

page:/:locale/users/:handle:apps/web/src.note: TanStack Start route /$locale/users/$handle ports the legacy auth-gated community profile page. The loader runs the shared fail-closed current-user auth gate before any profile lookup, redirects anonymous visitors to the locale login route with nextUrl, sets private no-store route headers, reads only the legacy public profile fields for the requested handle through a caller-scoped internal-api users-server facade that preserves Supabase RLS, renders the profile header with TanStack-safe image/avatar primitives, and has explicit no-auth Playwright coverage. A dedicated Rust/backend reader remains a follow-up backend migration boundary.
